results.rendered_html:
vi-√rañj P. Ā. -rajyati, ˚te, to be changed in colour, be discoloured, lose one's natural colour,  Kāv. ;  VarBṛS.  &c.;
to become changed in disposition or affection, become indifferent to, take no interest in (abl. or loc.),  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.:
Caus. -rañjayati, to discolour, stain,  Suśr.
